name: Maraurn'Zol
abilities:
Movement — RAMPAGE (meteor). On her turn, roll the grid and crash her down on that square. EVERY hero in line of sight of where she lands takes her Strike — this is the meteor. Her Strike (meteor only) ignores all cover: it burns through objects and walls.

x◆: +1 Rampage (extra meteor) for every 4 objectives taken.
2◆: Meteor blast radius 1 (also Strike the ring around the impact).
4◆: Meteor blast radius 2.
7◆: Meteor blast radius 3.

Advance: instead of a meteor she may walk 1 space. From an Advance she makes only a NORMAL melee Strike — reach 1, needs clear line of sight, no cover-ignore and no blast. Sight 6.

Escape: a struck hero may Flee — roll Defense; shields block the hit and scramble 1 space each. Get out of line of sight to be safe.
objectiveAbilities:
6◇: Add a CLONE of Maraurn'Zol (use the ✚ Clone button on her sheet). The clone takes its own Rampage after her with the same blast radius, and — like her — can't be killed, only shoved.

9◇: Meteor Storm — take one extra Rampage; every hero not behind a full wall is Struck.

name: The Fog
abilities:
Movement — CREEP. The Fog never teleports. Roll its movement die (D20) — its own +2 is added for you — and slide it forward that many spaces, engulfing everything it rolls over. It creeps faster the deeper the game runs.

1◆: Strike all heroes 1 space away.
4◆: Reach 2 — strike heroes 2 spaces away.
8◆: Reach 3 — strike heroes 3 spaces away.
2◆: +D4 to movement rolls.
4◆: +D4 to movement rolls.

Heroes inside a building are SAFE — the Fog cannot strike them. Sight 6.

Escape: do NOT try to shove it back (its reach outgrows the push and you stay pinned — a loop). Break line of sight or step into a building. The Fog is slow early; outrun it while you can.
objectiveAbilities:
2◇: The Fog sees heroes through all objects — but still NOT through building walls.

9◇: Suffocate — kill up to 2 heroes who are not inside a building.

name: Ghathag
abilities:
Movement — STALK. Each turn he steps forward in a straight line toward the nearest hero. He cannot enter buildings (cannot pass through doors). While stalking his sight drops to 1 — slip out of his lane and he loses your scent.

x◆: +1 Stalk for every 4 objectives taken.
2◆: Stalk 3 spaces.
4◆: Stalk 3 more spaces.
6◆: Stalk 3 more spaces.
3◆: Place a barrier (use the 🧱 Barrier button). Barriers block movement and line of sight.
4◆: Ghathag is enraged — permanent +2 attack (his Strike becomes ⚔6). Being cornered by him is now deadly.

Sight 4 (only 1 while stalking).

Escape: a hero he reaches may Flee — roll Defense; shields block and scramble. Duck through a door; he can't follow you inside.
objectiveAbilities:
3◇: Place 2 barriers.
5◇: Place 2 barriers.
4◆: Barriers placed now have +2 life.
7◆: Barriers placed now have +2 more life.
9◇: Turn every barrier into a minion (roll each for its health).

name: Oblex
abilities:
Movement — OOZE. Oblex moves with the GRID ROLL (roll the grid, slide it there) — random repositioning, not a controlled walk. After moving it may trade places with any minion (its real teleport). It does NOT gain extra moves as objectives are taken.

Unlike a Rampage, an OOZE does NOT strike everyone in sight — Oblex is no bruiser. It only makes a weak normal Strike (⚔2) on a hero it lands next to; the danger is that it SWAPS a strong minion into your face instead.

1◆: Summon minions equal to 1 + 1 per 3 objectives taken (roll each d4 for health).
3◆: Or, instead of summoning, give +1 attack to one minion.
5◆: All minions may move 2 spaces each turn.

Minion baseline: ⚔2 / 🛡1 / ❤ d4. Its ladder buffs below apply to EVERY minion automatically. Sight 4.

Escape: a hero a minion reaches may Flee — roll Defense; shields block and scramble. Break line of sight from the swarm.
objectiveAbilities:
1◇: Summon 2 minions.
3◇: Summon 3 minions.
5◇: Summon 4 minions.
4◆: Every minion gets +1 attack (automatic).
6◆: Every minion gets +1 reach (automatic).
7◆: Every minion gets +1 attack (automatic).
9◇: Double the number of minions on the board.

name: Wyht, the Trickster
abilities:
Movement — BLINK. She flits around the board: roll the grid to blink her to a random square (a short Rampage), positioning for her tricks. She wins by disruption, not by blows.

x◆: +1 Blink for every 3 objectives taken.
2◆: Relocate any 1 objective to a space you choose.
4◆: Every hero discards 1 card — or one hero of your choice discards 2.
6◆: Draw 2 monster cards, OR one hero of your choice discards down to 4 cards.
8◆: Swap the positions of two objectives, or add +1 to one objective's value.

Wyht draws an extra card whenever she draws. Sight 5.

A Blink that passes a hero in line of sight lets her Strike that hero (weak, ⚔2). They may Flee — roll Defense.
objectiveAbilities:
1◇: Add 1 objective to the board (this raises the heroes' goal).
3◇: Randomly relocate ALL objectives.
5◇: Add 1 objective to the board.
10◇: Choose a hero — they die.
